[semantic.rt-type] Error: function `main` parameter `text` has rt-unsafe type `Text`
   ╭─[ examples/invalid/rt_forbidden_text.sarif:1:9 ]
   │
 1 │ fn main(text: Text) -> Bool {
   │         ─────┬────  
   │              ╰────── function `main` parameter `text` has rt-unsafe type `Text`
   │ 
   │ Help: Use only bounded, non-allocating types in rt signatures.
───╯
check failed
